official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound start_configuration singleton body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns start_configuration to packet id 0x76.
The official start_configuration body is empty through StreamCodec.unit(INSTANCE).
The official packet reports isTerminal() true.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, terminal flag, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove runtime state-transition handling or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer runtime state-transition handling or client-load completion.
